title: Simplest Paxels
description: Tiered paxels combining pickaxe, axe and shovel
body:
# About

**Tired of vanilla tools cluttering your inventory? Use a paxel!**

This mod adds paxels that combine the functions of a pickaxe, shovel, and axe in one tool, which greatly simplifies gameplay.

# How It Works

To obtain a paxel, you must combine a pickaxe, shovel, and axe on a crafting table.

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0915468465b65b2cf51f744d69fabd09d0ef36cc.png)

# FAQ

**Q:** Will you port Simplest Paxels to Fabric?\
**A:** No, we usually only use Neoforge

**Q:** Will you back-port Simplest Paxels to X version?\
**A:** No, we don't usually back-port
